response: This code calculates the standard CRC-32 (Cyclic Redundancy Check) checksum of the input data using a **bit-by-bit shift-and-XOR algorithm**. Specifically, it processes each byte sequentially by shifting bits to the right and applying the reversed IEEE 802.3 polynomial (`0xEDB88320`) whenever the least significant bit is 1, which computes the checksum without needing a precomputed lookup table.
